en: TO THE CHOIRMASTER. OF DAVID, THE SERVANT OF THE LORD. Transgression speaks to the wicked deep in his heart; there is no fear of God before his eyes.
zh: 惡人的罪過在他心中深處說話， 他眼中也不怕 神。

en: For he flatters himself in his own eyes that his iniquity cannot be found out and hated.
zh: 罪過媚惑他， 因此在他眼中看來， 自己的罪孽不會揭發，也不會被恨惡。

en: The words of his mouth are trouble and deceit; he has ceased to act wisely and do good.
zh: 他口中的話語都是罪惡和詭詐， 他不再是明慧的，也不再行善。

en: He plots trouble while on his bed; he sets himself in a way that is not good; he does not reject evil.
zh: 他在床上密謀作惡， 定意行在不善的道路上， 並不棄絕惡事。

en: Your steadfast love, O LORD, extends to the heavens, your faithfulness to the clouds.
zh: 耶和華啊！你的慈愛上及諸天， 你的信實高達雲霄。

en: Your righteousness is like the mountains of God; your judgments are like the great deep; man and beast you save, O LORD.
zh: 你的公義好像大山， 你的公正如同深淵； 耶和華啊！人和牲畜，你都庇佑。

en: How precious is your steadfast love, O God! The children of mankind take refuge in the shadow of your wings.
zh: 神啊！你的慈愛多麼寶貴； 世人都投靠在你的翅膀蔭下。

en: They feast on the abundance of your house, and you give them drink from the river of your delights.
zh: 他們必飽嘗你殿裡的盛筵， 你必使他們喝你樂河的水。

en: For with you is the fountain of life; in your light do we see light.
zh: 因為生命的泉源在你那裡； 在你的光中，我們才能看見光。

en: Oh, continue your steadfast love to those who know you, and your righteousness to the upright of heart!
zh: 求你常施慈愛給認識你的人， 常施公義給心裡正直的人。

en: Let not the foot of arrogance come upon me, nor the hand of the wicked drive me away.
zh: 求你不容驕傲人的腳踐踏 我， 不讓惡人的手使我流離飄蕩。

en: There the evildoers lie fallen; they are thrust down, unable to rise.
zh: 作惡的人必跌倒； 他們被推倒，不能再起來。
